data.html:
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "tw-animate-css";

@custom-variant dark (&:is(.dark *));

@theme inline {
  --color-background: var(--background);
  --color-foreground: var(--foreground);
  --font-sans: var(--font-geist-sans);
  --font-mono: var(--font-geist-mono);
  --color-sidebar-ring: var(--sidebar-ring);
  --color-sidebar-border: var(--sidebar-border);
  --color-sidebar-accent-foreground: var(--sidebar-accent-foreground);
  --color-sidebar-accent: var(--sidebar-accent);
  --color-sidebar-primary-foreground: var(--sidebar-primary-foreground);
  --color-sidebar-primary: var(--sidebar-primary);
  --color-sidebar-foreground: var(--sidebar-foreground);
  --color-sidebar: var(--sidebar);
  --color-chart-5: var(--chart-5);
  --color-chart-4: var(--chart-4);
  --color-chart-3: var(--chart-3);
  --color-chart-2: var(--chart-2);
  --color-chart-1: var(--chart-1);
  --color-ring: var(--ring);
  --color-input: var(--input);
  --color-border: var(--border);
  --color-destructive: var(--destructive);
  --color-accent-foreground: var(--accent-foreground);
  --color-accent: var(--accent);
  --color-muted-foreground: var(--muted-foreground);
  --color-muted: var(--muted);
  --color-secondary-foreground: var(--secondary-foreground);
  --color-secondary: var(--secondary);
  --color-primary-foreground: var(--primary-foreground);
  --color-primary: var(--primary);
  --color-popover-foreground: var(--popover-foreground);
  --color-popover: var(--popover);
  --color-card-foreground: var(--card-foreground);
  --color-card: var(--card);
  --radius-sm: calc(var(--radius) - 4px);
  --radius-md: calc(var(--radius) - 2px);
  --radius-lg: var(--radius);
  --radius-xl: calc(var(--radius) + 4px);
}

/* Professional Light Theme */
:root {
  --radius: 0.75rem;
  --background: oklch(0.99 0 0);
  --foreground: oklch(0.15 0 0);
  --card: oklch(1 0 0);
  --card-foreground: oklch(0.15 0 0);
  --popover: oklch(1 0 0);
  --popover-foreground: oklch(0.15 0 0);
  --primary: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  --primary-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
  --secondary: oklch(0.96 0.01 200);
  --secondary-foreground: oklch(0.25 0 0);
  --muted: oklch(0.97 0.005 200);
  --muted-foreground: oklch(0.45 0 0);
  --accent: oklch(0.96 0.02 200);
  --accent-foreground: oklch(0.2 0 0);
  --destructive: oklch(0.55 0.22 25);
  --border: oklch(0.9 0.01 200);
  --input: oklch(0.92 0.01 200);
  --ring: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  --chart-1: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  --chart-2: oklch(0.65 0.18 150);
  --chart-3: oklch(0.70 0.15 50);
  --chart-4: oklch(0.60 0.18 280);
  --chart-5: oklch(0.65 0.2 340);
  --sidebar: oklch(0.98 0 0);
  --sidebar-foreground: oklch(0.15 0 0);
  --sidebar-primary: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  --sidebar-primary-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
  --sidebar-accent: oklch(0.96 0.02 200);
  --sidebar-accent-foreground: oklch(0.2 0 0);
  --sidebar-border: oklch(0.92 0.01 200);
  --sidebar-ring: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  
  /* Signal Colors */
  --success: oklch(0.65 0.18 145);
  --success-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
  --warning: oklch(0.75 0.15 85);
  --warning-foreground: oklch(0.15 0 0);
  --danger: oklch(0.55 0.22 25);
  --danger-foreground: oklch(1 0 0);
}

@layer base {
  * {
    @apply border-border outline-ring/50;
  }
  body {
    @apply bg-background text-foreground;
  }
  html {
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
  }
}

/* Professional Scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: oklch(0.96 0 0);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: oklch(0.75 0.05 200);
  border-radius: 4px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: oklch(0.65 0.08 200);
}

/* Smooth animations */
@keyframes fadeIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(20px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-20px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); }
}

@keyframes pulse-subtle {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0.7; }
}

@keyframes bounce-subtle {
  0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }
  50% { transform: translateY(-5px); }
}

.animate-fade-in {
  animation: fadeIn 0.5s ease-out forwards;
}

.animate-slide-in-right {
  animation: slideInRight 0.5s ease-out forwards;
}

.animate-slide-in-left {
  animation: slideInLeft 0.5s ease-out forwards;
}

.animate-pulse-subtle {
  animation: pulse-subtle 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

.animate-bounce-subtle {
  animation: bounce-subtle 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}

/* Card styles */
.card-shadow {
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 5%), 0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 5%);
}

.card-shadow-lg {
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px oklch(0 0 0 / 5%), 0 10px 30px oklch(0 0 0 / 8%);
}

.card-hover {
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.card-hover:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 25px oklch(0 0 0 / 10%), 0 4px 12px oklch(0.55 0.2 200 / 5%);
}

/* Trust badges */
.trust-gradient {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.55 0.2 200) 0%, oklch(0.50 0.18 220) 100%);
}

/* Signal styles */
.signal-buy {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.65 0.18 145) 0%, oklch(0.55 0.16 150) 100%);
  color: white;
}

.signal-sell {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.55 0.22 25) 0%, oklch(0.50 0.20 30) 100%);
  color: white;
}

/* Button styles */
.btn-primary {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.55 0.2 200) 0%, oklch(0.50 0.18 220) 100%);
  color: white;
  font-weight: 600;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.50 0.22 200) 0%, oklch(0.45 0.20 220) 100%);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 15px oklch(0.55 0.2 200 / 30%);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: oklch(0.96 0.01 200);
  color: oklch(0.25 0 0);
  font-weight: 500;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  border: 1px solid oklch(0.9 0.01 200);
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: oklch(0.94 0.02 200);
  border-color: oklch(0.85 0.02 200);
}

/* Provider card */
.provider-card {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid oklch(0.92 0.01 200);
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.provider-card:hover {
  border-color: oklch(0.80 0.05 200);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 40px oklch(0 0 0 / 8%);
}

/* Badge styles */
.badge-verified {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.55 0.2 200) 0%, oklch(0.50 0.18 220) 100%);
  color: white;
}

.badge-top-provider {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.75 0.15 50) 0%, oklch(0.70 0.13 55) 100%);
  color: white;
}

.badge-elite {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.60 0.18 280) 0%, oklch(0.55 0.16 285) 100%);
  color: white;
}

/* Hero gradient */
.hero-gradient {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.55 0.2 200 / 5%) 0%, oklch(0.50 0.18 220 / 3%) 100%);
}

/* Glass effect */
.glass-light {
  background: oklch(1 0 0 / 80%);
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
}

/* Focus states */
input:focus, textarea:focus, select:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.55 0.2 200 / 10%);
}

/* Selection */
::selection {
  background: oklch(0.55 0.2 200 / 20%);
  color: oklch(0.15 0 0);
}

/* Stats counter */
@keyframes countUp {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

.count-up {
  animation: countUp 0.6s ease-out forwards;
}

/* Line clamp */
.line-clamp-2 {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.line-clamp-3 {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* Skeleton loading */
.skeleton {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.96 0 0) 25%, oklch(0.94 0 0) 50%, oklch(0.96 0 0) 75%);
  background-size: 200% 100%;
  animation: skeleton-loading 1.5s infinite;
}

@keyframes skeleton-loading {
  0% { background-position: 200% 0; }
  100% { background-position: -200% 0; }
}

/* Win rate progress bar */
.win-rate-bar {
  background: oklch(0.92 0 0);
  border-radius: 100px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.win-rate-fill {
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, oklch(0.55 0.22 25) 0%, oklch(0.65 0.18 145) 100%);
  height: 100%;
  border-radius: 100px;
  transition: width 1s ease-out;
}

/* Notification badge */
.notification-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: -4px;
  right: -4px;
  background: oklch(0.55 0.22 25);
  color: white;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 600;
  min-width: 18px;
  height: 18px;
  border-radius: 9px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

/* Mobile menu */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .mobile-menu {
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    background: white;
    z-index: 50;
    transform: translateX(-100%);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  
  .mobile-menu.open {
    transform: translateX(0);
  }
}

/* PWA Install Banner */
.pwa-banner {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, oklch(0.55 0.2 200) 0%, oklch(0.50 0.18 220) 100%);
  color: white;
}

/* Responsive typography */
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  h1 { font-size: 1.75rem; }
  h2 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
  h3 { font-size: 1.25rem; }
}

/* Smooth page transitions */
.page-transition {
  opacity: 0;
  animation: fadeIn 0.4s ease-out forwards;
}

/* Tab active indicator */
.tab-active {
  position: relative;
}

.tab-active::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -2px;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 2px;
  background: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  border-radius: 1px;
}

/* Pricing card highlight */
.pricing-highlight {
  border: 2px solid oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  position: relative;
}

.pricing-highlight::before {
  content: 'Most Popular';
  position: absolute;
  top: -12px;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  background: oklch(0.55 0.2 200);
  color: white;
  padding: 4px 16px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
}
